indicators.name: bookshelf
indicators.rationale: The bookshelf is not a resting surface and does not provide a comfortable place to lie down.

indicators.name: couch
indicators.rationale: The couch is not a suitable resting surface and is not designed for sleeping.

indicators.name: potted plant
indicators.rationale: The potted plant is not a resting surface and can be a source of allergens.

indicators.name: ceiling-mounted light fixture
indicators.rationale: The ceiling-mounted light fixture is not dimmable and can be bright, disrupting sleep.

indicators.name: white tiled walls
indicators.rationale: The white tiled walls are cold and not conducive to a warm sleep environment.

indicators.name: white floor
indicators.rationale: The white floor is cold and not conducive to a warm sleep environment.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is not well-suited for sleep (primary). The presence of a bookshelf, couch, potted plant, and ceiling-mounted light fixture all contribute to a negative sleep environment. The white tiled walls and floor also do not provide a warm and comfortable surface for sleep.
